kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=HIS, url=http://192.168.5.19:1600, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: Read State
File Should Exist
kw.doc: Fails unless the given ``path`` points to an existing file.

kw.name: Get File
kw.doc: Returns the contents of a specified file.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Get From Dictionary
kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.

kw.name: Should Not Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are equal.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Get From Dictionary
kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.
برگردوندن یک تخت خالی معتبر

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://192.168.5.19:1600/api/Filing/ChangeToAdmit path_url=/api/Filing/ChangeToAdmit headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': 'application/json', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'bearer eyJhbGciOiJodHRwOi8vd3d3LnczLm9yZy8yMDAxLzA0L3htbGRzaWctbW9yZSNobWFjLXNoYTI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..hbjS-3kAhrY7WwD7IWjko1J4sMmXUVQKAZJUTVkA8UA', 'Cookie': 'eyJhbGciOiJodHRwOi8vd3d3LnczLm9yZy8yMDAxLzA0L3htbGRzaWctbW9yZSNobWFjLXNoYTI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..hbjS-3kAhrY7WwD7IWjko1J4sMmXUVQKAZJUTVkA8UA', 'Content-Length': '51', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"preAdmitDto": {"admitId": 356244, "bedId": 1284}}'

POST Response : url=http://192.168.5.19:1600/api/Filing/ChangeToAdmit status=200, reason=OK headers={'Cache-Control': 'no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate', 'Pragma': 'no-cache', 'Content-Length': '4', 'Content-Type': 'application/json; charset=utf-8', 'Expires': '-1', 'Referrer-Policy': 'no-referrer', 'X-Frame-Options': 'Deny', 'X-XSS-Protection': '1; mode=block', 'X-Content-Type-Options': 'nosniff', 'X-Download-Options': 'noopen', 'X-Robots-Tag': 'noindex, nofollow', 'Content-Security-Policy': "default-src 'self';script-src 'self';style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline';img-src 'self';media-src 'self';font-src 'self';form-action 'self';frame-ancestors 'self';block-all-mixed-content;report-uri /report", 'Content-Security-Policy-Report-Only': "default-src 'self';img-src 'self';media-src 'self'", 'X-Security': 'on', 'Date': 'Fri, 27 Feb 2026 21:14:45 GMT'} body=true
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.
